## Evidence

What evidence supports this change?

## Proposed Verdict（裁决建议）

If this PR adds a Case, choose one:

- [ ] Preserve（保留）
- [ ] Promote to Skill（升级为 Skill）
- [ ] Extract Factor（抽取因子）
- [ ] Keep as Habit（保持为习惯）
- [ ] Fix Environment（修复环境）
- [ ] Reject Pattern（淘汰模式）
- [ ] Open Case（开放案件）

## Privacy Checklist

- [ ] No raw private session logs
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, cookies, or credentials
- [ ] No customer data
- [ ] No private local paths
- [ ] Evidence is minimized and redacted

## Operational Checklist

- [ ] The change is actionable by another Agent or maintainer
- [ ] The change follows `docs/governance/change-scope-policy.md`
- [ ] Pair Contribution changes do not modify infra, protocol, governance, skill routing, ADRs, GitHub templates, or development rules
- [ ] Protected path changes include linked issue / design / ADR context
- [ ] Links are relative or public
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes
